caption: A man with distinctive grey-blonde styled hair and glasses is recording a podcast in an indoor studio. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and suspenders, paired with large black over-ear headphones. He speaks into a black microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him, a woman with pink hair wears a green dress and stands near a black backdrop featuring the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS". A framed picture of a shield logo hangs on the white wall. On-screen graphics include a circular logo containing a microphone and the text "PODCAST", as well as the text "ESS TALK 101". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak and gestures with his left hand, while the woman remains stationary in the background.
